Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Ningjing Jiang, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, LLP (310) 933-4271 njiang@quillarrowlaw.com Attorneys for Plaintiff, AVONTE DARIUS CAMPINHA- BACONTE
No other appearances

At the start of today's hearing, counsel for Plaintiff withdraws her notice of contest and submits to the Court's tentative ruling.

No argument is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.'s Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration

Defendant Tesla Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Continued

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.'s Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion to compel arbitration is denied without prejudice. The e-filed versions of moving party's declarations do not attach the exhibits referred to in the declarations.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
